title: Better Animal Armor
description: Better horse and wolf armor, vanilla and modded, more to come!
body:
For now, it only changes the item textures of horse and wolf armor.

# Compatibility
- Vanilla Minecraft
  - Horse armor
  - Wolf armor
- [More Wolf Armors](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-wolf-armors)
- [Simple Netherite Horse Armor](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-netherite-horse-armor)
- [Vanilla Backport](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanillabackport)

# To do
- Change also the entity textures of all armors (vanilla and modded)
